question: Does GBPIET have a bank on campus?
answer: Yes! GBPIET has a Bank of Baroda branch and ATM facility on campus. Students can easily access banking services without leaving campus.

question: Does GBPIET have a post office?
answer: Yes! GBPIET has an on-campus Post Office facility for students and staff. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/post-office/

question: What eateries are available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has multiple eateries and canteen facilities on campus serving students and staff. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/eateries/

question: Does GBPIET have a shopping centre?
answer: Yes! GBPIET has a Shopping Centre on campus with daily needs stores. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/shopping-centre/

question: What is M.G. Auditorium at GBPIET?
answer: M.G. Auditorium is the main auditorium at GBPIET used for cultural events, seminars, convocations and college functions. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/m-g-auditorium/

question: What internet facility is available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has high-speed internet connectivity across campus including hostels. WiFi is available in academic buildings and residential areas. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/internet/

question: Does GBPIET have places of worship?
answer: Yes! GBPIET campus has places of worship for students and staff of all faiths. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/places-of-worships/
